subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I turn my face unto Thee with a countenance fixed upon the Kingdom of Thy mercy and a throbbing heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انی اتوجه الیک بوجه ناظر الی ملکوت رحمانیتک و قلب خافق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the departed, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
